prerequisites: A Lever account with access to the Integrations and API page in Settings (API Credentials tab) to create credentials.
A start_date value, since the connector requires it to define the point from which to begin syncing records.
For OAuth: a registered Lever partner integration that provides a client_id and client_secret.
Decide the environment to target, since Lever exposes separate sandbox (api.sandbox.lever.co) and production (api.lever.co) hosts.

authMethods.name: API key (Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: Maps to the credentials.api_key secret field. Lever API keys authenticate with HTTP Basic auth: supply the API key as the username and leave the password blank. Create and manage keys from the Integrations and API page in Settings, on the API Credentials tab.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0
authMethods.summary: Maps to the credentials.client_secret and credentials.refresh_token secret fields. Lever partner integrations authenticate via OAuth: register the app to obtain a client_id and client_secret, exchange an authorization code at https://auth.lever.co/oauth/token for an access token, and use the refresh_token to obtain new access tokens when they expire.

setupSteps.title: Choose an authentication method
setupSteps.body: Use an API key for direct account access, or OAuth for a partner integration. The connector's credentials field accepts either an api_key, or a client_secret plus refresh_token for OAuth.

setupSteps.title: Create an API key (API key method)
setupSteps.body: In your Lever account, open the Integrations and API page in Settings and go to the API Credentials tab. Generate an API key and grant it access to any confidential data the sync requires. Provide this value as credentials.api_key. Lever authenticates the key with Basic auth (key as username, blank password).

setupSteps.title: Set up OAuth (OAuth method)
setupSteps.body: Register a Lever partner integration to obtain a client_id and client_secret, requesting the scopes your sync needs (note that Write:admin scopes include the corresponding Read:admin endpoints). Complete the OAuth flow to obtain a refresh_token. Provide credentials.client_secret and credentials.refresh_token to the connector.

setupSteps.title: Select the environment
setupSteps.body: Set the environment config field to target either Lever sandbox (api.sandbox.lever.co) or production (api.lever.co). Use credentials issued for the matching environment, since sandbox and production are configured separately.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Provide the required start_date config field to define the earliest point from which the connector should begin syncing records.

sources.title: Lever API Overview (authentication and API key creation)
Lever OAuth for Partner Product Integrations (client_id, client_secret, refresh_token, scopes, sandbox vs production)
